description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno City held briefing sessions on its emergency financial measures in January and February 2026 (Reiwa 8) at Hanno City Hall and district administrative centers (all sessions have ended). The sessions explained the circumstances leading to the emergency financial measures and reviewed of operations and projects.

Distributed materials are as follows:
• Materials up to February 15, 2026 session
• Materials from February 17, 2026 session onward (briefing materials and partial excerpts of the confirmed Operations and Projects Review Sheet)
• Materials from February 22, 2026 session onward (briefing materials; no changes to partial excerpts of the confirmed Operations and Projects Review Sheet)

The complete confirmed Operations and Projects Review Sheet is available on a separate page.

【January 2026 Sessions】
Held January 17 (Saturday) 1:30 PM–3:30 PM and January 18 (Sunday) 9:30 AM–11:30 AM at the Hanno City Hall Annex. Session records are available.

【February 2026 Sessions】
Held at 12 district administrative centers including Kaji, Seimei, and Agano districts from February 9–28, 2026. Sign language interpretation provided at Hanno Central District (February 15), Fujimi District (February 19), and East Agano District (February 28). No advance registration required. Attendance may be limited if demand is high.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/zaiseika/kinkyuuzaiseitaisaku/12708.html
summary: ℹ️ Emergency Financial Measures Briefing Sessions (all sessions completed)
